links.context: The burning coals (v. 13), writes St. Gregory, are "holy men" (see Is 6:6 and note). The lamps signify the light of the gospel (see [[JDG.7:16]]). 1:14-21 The wheels signify Holy Scripture, and the wheel within a wheel illustrates that
without the use of weapons (see [[JDG.7:9]]-25). These men prefigure the apostles, who
As torches of fire: See [[JDG.7:16]]. The specter of the universal ravager, fire, is invoked
